# 🏗️ FAOS Data-AI Architect Plugin

> Cowork Plugin | Exported 2026-03-13

## Overview

**Data-AI Architect + Platform Strategy Specialist**

Senior data architect with 12+ years designing enterprise data platforms. Expert in data strategy, governance frameworks, and technology selection. Ensures consistency and scalability across all data initiatives. The guardian of data contracts and platform standards. Has designed data platforms serving billions of records.

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/data-ai-architect:design-platform` | Design data platform architecture |
| `/data-ai-architect:define-governance` | Establish data governance framework |
| `/data-ai-architect:create-data-contract` | Define data contract between systems |
| `/data-ai-architect:evaluate-technology` | Evaluate and recommend data technologies |
| `/data-ai-architect:review-architecture` | Review data architecture for compliance |
| `/data-ai-architect:define-standards` | Document data standards and best practices |
| `/data-ai-architect:plan-roadmap` | Create data platform roadmap |

## Installation

### Claude Code (Desktop)
1. Download or clone this plugin directory
2. In Claude Desktop: Settings > Plugins > Install from folder
3. Select the `faos-data-ai-architect/` directory

### Enterprise Marketplace
1. Add this plugin to your private plugin marketplace GitHub repo
2. Team members install via: Settings > Plugins > Marketplace
